product.name: ArWoWear 330 Moda Pro El
product.familyDescriptorPl: Robocze modowe — stretch i polar, wielobrandowe
product.familyDescriptorEn: Fashion workwear — stretch and fleece, multi-brand
product.categorySourceGroup: Inherent Flame Retardant Elasthane and Fleece Workwear Fabrics
product.titleDescriptor: 58% Modacrylic 35% Cotton 2% Carbon 5% Elasthane, Inherent Flame Retardant Elastane Antistatic Fabric
product.specLine: 330 g/m², 58% Modacrylic 35% Cotton 2% Carbon 5% Elastane, Inherent Flame Retardant, Elastane,Antistatic 3/1S Twill Fabric
descriptions: 58% Modacrylic 35% Cotton 2% Carbon 5% Elastane, inherent flame retardant elasthane antistatic twill fabric .
ArWoWear 330 Moda Pro El fabric is mostly used by electrical workers and miltary applications.
It is resistant to very high sun level, with fastness level of 4 to 5.
ArWoWear 330 Moda Pro are inherent flame retardant with EN 11612 certification.
Suitable for antistatic application, certified for EN ISO 1149.
It provides arc flash protection with EN 61482 class 1 (4 kA) certification.
58% Modacrylic 35% Cotton 2% Carbon 5% Elasthane, Inherent Flame Retardant Elastane Antistatic Fabric
330 g/m², 58% Modacrylic 35% Cotton 2% Carbon 5% Elastane, Inherent Flame Retardant, Elastane,Antistatic 3/1S Twill Fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 58% Modacrylic (MAC) 35% Cotton (CO) 2%Carbon (CF) 5% Elastane (El) | EN ISO 2076
Yarn | Warp:30/2 Ne; Weft:30/2 Ne | EN ISO 2060
Tensile Strength | Warp > 1000N ; Weft > 800N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 25N ; Weft > 25N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Flame and Heat Protection | Yes | EN ISO 11612

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Product description explicitly states use by electrical workers, and technical data confirms arc-flash protection and antistatic certification directly relevant to electrical/energy work.
EN ISO 20471 certification and hi-vis property listed, but no explicit high-visibility safety garment context beyond the standard reference.
Description explicitly names military applications as an intended use of the fabric.
FR and antistatic properties could relate to metal industry hazards, but no explicit welding or foundry use stated.

evidence: ArWoWear 330 Moda Pro El fabric is mostly used by electrical workers and miltary applications.
It provides arc flash protection with EN 61482 class 1 (4 kA) certification.
Suitable for antistatic application, certified for EN ISO 1149.
primary.rationale: The product is explicitly described as used by electrical workers, with strong technical support for arc-flash protection (EN 61482) and antistatic performance (EN 1149-5), which are the defining certifications for electrical/energy sector protective fabrics.

evidence: ArWoWear 330 Moda Pro El fabric is mostly used by electrical workers and miltary applications.
secondary.rationale: Military use is explicitly named as an intended application in the product description, independently supporting a secondary military classification, though with less technical detail than the electrical/energy use case.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: EN ISO 20471 certification and hi-vis property listed, but no explicit garment or safety-warning use context beyond the standard reference.
FR and antistatic properties could theoretically apply to metalworking, but no explicit welding, foundry or metallurgy use is stated.
General workwear fits the FR coverall application field, but explicit narrower sectors (energy, military) are directly stated, making this less specific.
